_purpose: This is a DESIGN SYSTEM REVIEW PAGE. Push this first to any new project so the client can review colors, fonts, buttons, card styles, and section patterns before you build actual pages. Replace placeholder values with the project brief's branding.
_usage: 1. Copy to projects/<name>/design-system-page.json  2. Update colors/fonts from brief  3. Push to site  4. Client reviews  5. Adjust and re-push until approved
title: Design System

settings.editor: Review all visual building blocks below. Once approved, these styles will be used consistently across all pages.

Body Text - 16px Inter Regular. This is what paragraph text looks like throughout the website. It should be easy to read with comfortable line height and appropriate contrast against the background. Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit.
Small Text / Caption - 13px Inter. Used for metadata, captions, and secondary information.
White background, subtle shadow, 12px corners, 32px padding. Used for services, features, and info cards.
Testimonial Card Style. Light purple background, no shadow, italic quote text. Used for client reviews.
Image top, content below. 1px border, no shadow. Used for blog posts, portfolio items, team members.
These are the standard section layouts that will be used across all pages:

Section Header Pattern - Every section starts with a label (uppercase, primary color, 14px, tracked) + H2 title (36px, dark) + optional subtitle (16px, gray). Centered or left-aligned depending on layout.

Hero Section - Dark background, split layout (55/40), H1 + paragraph + 2 buttons on left, image on right. 120px vertical padding.

Stats Bar - White background, 4 counters in a row, 64px vertical padding. Acts as a trust signal.

Card Grid - 3 columns on desktop, 2 on tablet, 1 on mobile. 24px gap. Cards have consistent 32px padding.

Split Content - 45/50 image + text side by side. Used for About, Why Choose Us. Alternating image left/right.

CTA Banner - Gradient background (primary to secondary at 135deg). Centered text + 2 buttons. 64px padding.

Footer - Dark background. 4-column layout (30/20/20/25). Copyright bar with top border separator.
All spacing values follow an 8-point grid for visual rhythm and consistency.

Section Padding: 80px (desktop) / 48px (mobile)
Hero Padding: 120px (desktop) / 80px (mobile)
CTA Padding: 64px (desktop) / 48px (mobile)
Card Padding: 32px all sides
Element Gap (cards): 24px
Element Gap (within cards): 16px
Section Content Gap: 48px between heading group and content
Max Content Width: 1200px (boxed)
CTA Max Width: 800px
